reviews.review_description:
Don't get me wrong, vail is extremely fun to play and I have had some amazing moments playing this silly little VR game. However, the voice chat moderation is shocking, the amount of times I have heard kids (who are YOUNGER than I am) calling people the N-word hard R. And, no matter how mannt times I report them, vail or meta just don't do any thing. I absolutely rate this game as it is fun but I definitely wouldn't let someone around you play if they are under 13 as they might be exposed to some awful language from other kids who are playing.

Thank you for reading

developer_response.body:
Thanks for flagging this. We recently added a stronger voice moderation system specifically for this kind of behavior. If you run into it, report the player using the "ABUSIVE COMMUNICATIONS" option. 
Those reports get reviewed automatically and lead to much faster sanctions.

reviews.review_description:
VAIL is a great VR shooter, no matter what you're looking for in a VR shooter. It has a lot of free content, and has something for you no matter if you're a casual or experienced player. 

There's a huge social aspect to the game, so even if you're tired of getting stomped or from shooting, there's plenty to do and even more coming soon. 

Every aspect of the game can be accessed for free if you work hard. Plenty of kiddos don't know what they're talking about in these low ratings.

All I can say is to just jump in and see for yourself!

reviews.review_title: It's a big NO as a parent!
reviews.review_description: This game COULD be fun if there weren't a ton of smug bullies who want to harass and constantly kill younger kids that genuinely are on it to fkn play! There should be a way to block other players instead of just doing a little BS "report" of that player. It's ridiculous that you can rarely enjoy the game due to little a**holes who obviously can't play but get on here to be jerks.

Hi AEXLAB,

I enjoy VAIL VR, but I’m having problems with matchmaking and finding servers on my Meta Quest 3. Sometimes the game works, but other times I can’t find matches or join games for a very long time. I also had issues joining friends.

I’ve checked my internet connection and restarted my headset, but the problem keeps coming back. Please look into server stability and matchmaking for Quest players.

Thank you.

reviews.review_title: Update made extraction mode a buggy hell
reviews.review_description:
I loved this game enough to farm the full game pass with the in game sweatshop that is mining, however, with the skill tree update to extraction, gear that I buy with the in game currency just seems to not spawn in with me, wasting my money and getting me killed. 

And Gear tokens are similarly bugged and refuse to work. Also, 2-3 Skill points a WEEK with a massive skill tree just to use basic necessities?

Can I suggest instead using Premium currency we can also use Ore for Quarry skill tree points or like 1 Million Credits for the Extraction sill tree? Just a suggestion for when you bug fix everything That broke

No matter your age or bank account balance, you HAVE to play this masterpiece of a game. Addicting with a skill curve and perfect gameplay loop. I'm so hyped for what they're going to add in the future, too. Only negatives I would say are varied connectivity issues depending on what you play on, I use a quest 3s with decent graphics, works pretty smoothly. If you're playing on quest 2, it may be worse in both graphics and speed, though. Player base is pretty big, but matchup times can get VERY long sometimes. Depends on the day and mode, can vary from nearly instant to 3+ minutes. Wide array of skins, and not pay to win in the slightest. Really fleshed out, and you can tell how far it's come. You NEED to try this game, I promise you will never leave (unless you're a lil ragequit randy), ✌️ peace homies, hope this influenced your choice.

This could be one of the best VR shooters out there. The smooth controls and great graphics really come together and the fact you don't have to buy it is even nicer from the devs. Only thing I don't like is the community. Sometimes I meet very nice people and sometimes the complete opposite.

I grinded getting killed over and over again mining for ore to experience the pvp part of the game. I  want the time I wasted back. I can’t believe I was so stupid in believing that this game was all that it claimed to be. It constantly crashes first off, but maybe that wont happen for you if you get the game, but what will happen is you will be forced into lobbies full of sweaty greasy losers bums who swing around their weightless guns because the only realistic thing about them is maybe the reloads, thats it. Microtransactions and the shop items are constantly slammed into your face and you just cannot have fun without using some sort of „meta“ full auto loser weapon that has the recoil and fire rate if an smg but the damage of a sniper rifle, so if you try to use a semi auto weapon and play tactically its not for you. The maps are honestly ok at best, and the rest of the game is just slop appealing to little kids. I find it very predatory and difficult to have fun on this game and  the one good thing I can think of is that they have a roadmap. As of now, I think the current state of this game has potential but the sweaty and frankly annoying community as well as the greedy devs make it hard to enjoy, and one more thing, in some games you have this blackboard and these interactive chalnks and if you try to draw ANYTHING on it even nothing weird, you just get spray painted over by these corny losers and can’t even express yourself creatively (that last part was kinda just a personal rant). I aint mad, Im just a little let down.

I have over 200 hours in this game. I’ve been playing since it released on Quest and had been following the game since it was in Alpha. Me personally I think the game in its state right now is meh. Most of the updates are buns and always end up with something getting broken or even re-broken. I think they’ve lost their scope for the game, especially with extraction. They have enough people on the dev team (to my knowledge) to have two teams work on updates for extraction and one for the base game. We haven’t had a genuine base game update since I think the NXS Hammer (the revolver) came out. There’s A LOT I would love to complain about thoroughly about this game, but I’ll leave it at that. 
-Revenant

Overall game: 9.2/10
Current game: 6.3/10

The game itself is amazing I have enjoyed every mode I have played, and this was one of my first purchases in vr. I believe the game is worth a paying for and rating a full five stars, heck if you dedicate time you can earn full access for free  however since the game got a free access mode, the free training grounds and citadel/ lobbys are full of of young kids shouting racist obscenities specifically shouting N____ (hard R)and drawing swastikas on the white boards...
Oh and there is mini golf!

It sounds like Vail VR really hits you on a bunch of levels at once—fast action, instant feedback, and the way every session feels different. The game’s “right now” intensity keeps your brain locked in: you react, improve, and immediately get rewarded with movement, teamwork, and those little wins that feel genuinely earned.

It also might be the social side of it—jumping in, hearing people around you, and sharing the same goal in real time makes it feel more like a hangout than a game. On top of that, VR adds a physical layer that’s hard to replicate elsewhere, so the experience can feel more immersive and energizing than flatscreen play, which makes it easy to come back again and again.

Now don’t get me wrong it’s decently fun but I wouldn’t say it’s fun enough to charge me a monthly subscription just to play core parts of the game I’d rather just go play sum else like contractors get ride of the monthly bs and have it just be a one time buy an an option to donate every month or week what ever I’m cool with that but game lost all respect in that aspect for me

One of the worst PvP games I've ever seen
and desync makes it look like Everyone is cheating you can shoot people through walls sometimes and the new damage models are the worst out of every game 0/10 would rather have Chinese water torture

State of the game.
Voice moderation - N/A Says you can report, but does nothing. The amount of voice clutter with racist, homophobic, and other comments is unbelievable.

Hackers - Didn't believe it until a met one on a MODERATOR account "Tropical Sensai" or something, just handing out free prestiages to people, or manipulating peoples accounts. They are so brazen they will do it in lobbies for people. The company wants this to be a completive game like this mind you.

Systems - They are layering broken systems upon broken systems. They say they will 'fix' it soon. Example, two maps for mining, one map works almost fine, the other half the gems are out of place to be able to be mined correctly. Instead of fixing the map, they add a skill tree that is completely useless for one of the maps. 50% of what they just added is pointless because they didn't fix the positioning of the old content. This is a trend.

Reviews - When they're stars get low for reviews, they are quick to add a new skin if they give a good review. Shows the state of the game in of itself.

Extraction - Is based around three man teams, but the amount of times I've seen five or six people together is not isolated. Discord allows them to que together, and work as a team. There is no punishment for this. There is no deploy alone option. Again, half done mode shipped out before old systems are even done.

reviews.review_title: Great game overall but buggy visuals
reviews.review_description: The game is awesome, its the best VR shooter game I've played so far on it. My only issue with it (other than the amount of kids on it), is that they have a visual filter that I'm assuming is suppose to make stuff outside of your vision blurry as to save computing time, but it is always bugged for me and it rotates that filter by ~90 degrees so I can see the right side of my very far right eye clear and everything to the left of some arbitrary line is pixelated. It would be phenomenal if there was a way to either disable this affect or to manually rotate the angle it assumes my VR is facing so that it works as intended. Outside of that, its a great game and I highly recommend getting the full version so yall can play the combat gamemodes!

Really have nothing to say, reload mechanics are awesome. It’s exactly like real guns and the knife mechanics are good. I have nothing to say, it’s the best game you can get on VR. ￼

Every time  I load in my game crashes immediately and if I try to load in my game freezes and there’s an outline and everything else is black  please fix it

Overall I love the game it’s great

This game is really great.  I do wish there were more Training Grounds maps, but I'm sure there are more coming.  Theres an issue with weapon skins, where they keep unequiping after matches.  Theres also a problem where the game keeps crashing.  Not sure why this happens, but it happens very very often.  Otherwise an amazing game
I would like if there was a timer along with the safety helmet.  I constantly crash, so I don't buy mining helmets even though I mine fairly often.  If there was like a 30 minute timer after leaving the game to regain your helmet, that would be amazing, and I'd definitely buy way more of them.
Every time i try to get in the game it freezes and its not the WiFi because i have the best WiFi out there FIX THIS IMMEDIATELY!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
Bro just having fun in this game until I see pride month gloves ew like not everyone supports that weird sexually stuff and vail needs to be more respectful

So one day i went on my vr to go play vail as usual, so i open the menu and it says something along the lines of "connection to lobby lost" and just tells me to accept it, i was like "okay..? My internet is fine what the hell?" So i continue and click one of the options to play (training grounds) and when i do, it loads, but then it kicks me out and puts me back into my armory for no reason, and it says "connection to lobby lost" 

Anyway, i read the update logs and it says to do the tutorial, i think "ohh. Thats probably why." So i do, MULTIPLE TIMES, and still nothing, im not sure why, and it doesnt specify what it means by "penalty for abusive communication" in the update logs, i barely talk as much anyway.

Has anyone else ran into this issue or is it just me? Because i have no idea what it means when it says theres a penalty for 
abusive communication.

I couldn't have said anything THAT bad, i cant even remember if i was rude or not, if i did say something bad, it was most likely me telling someone to shush because they are being annoying and loud or if someone said something rude to me and i retaliated by saying something rude back to them.

The funnest first person shooter game I’ve ever played. It had a ton of funny moments when I was playing with my friends and overall five star game I recommended to new people that like for suit games on VR. It’s worth the money and you’re gonna have a great time the guns are so unique also that I feel like I like, actually in real life shooting them yeah that’s my rating

This is my go-to VR shooter, its graphics are that perfect blend of cartoonist yet realistic, basically like a high quality 3d animated show. Its haptics, physics, and reloading are almost perfect. Although the full game is locked behind a 30$ or 100,000 ore pay wall, I would say its worth it. Plus, even if u cant afford it, there's plenty to do in the demo. Now we get to the bad part. The players are horrible. This game has no Voice chat censoring, so I constantly hear cussing and even the n-word.Then the camping to. Sometimes its hard to play at all since u just get killed when u spawn in. Other than that this game is Amazing. I would recommend it to anyone 12-13+
It was blurry for no reason so I reset my 3s and nothing so I deleted it and nothing so I can't do anything nothing works pls update your game to help it

I had a lot of loot, then successfully extracted it,
Then I tried to sell it at the machine.
But when I pulled the lever, nothing happened!
Then i pulled it again and again.
Please fix this bug.

This game is probably the best Vr Shooter game but you need to buy the whole game to change your loadout so what I’m saying is can you add where if you don’t own the game you would have to reach lvl.25 to unlock changing your loadout

reviews.review_title: Game is good but players are bad
reviews.review_description: I’m starting to think that people on Vail are being racist to nine year olds cause I’m nine and all I try to do is play artifact even tho artifact gives you the most exp the players in it are just hateful to nine year olds cause every time I join a game of artifact people vote kick me  like what did I do I’m just trying to grind levels and have fun but people wanna make teams fair so they kick people out the game like you may never know if they can carry you when you’re losing like I’m starting to think if nine year olds can’t play artifact and that’s like the only good gamemode besides quickplay so I think you guys should remove artifact or make a certain level where you can unlock artifact like at least do that and please make the level between 30-40 so you at least make it to where you have to be level 40
Nice community penguins when you mine are pretty annoying but everyone is nice you can team up with friends to kill Winnie players and help you mine good gun mechanics realistic Si-fi

Looks good but when you start playing it you get lag spikes out of nowhere straight in the tutorial course, then you get into a lobby of screaming children and in the end you keep killing each other with your enemies because netcode sucks and because your ping is below 40 while most of the players have 200+ ping
All of that makes the game barely playable
I'd rather play a gtag copy than this good looking piece of gaming industry

if your broke that's fine i am too. But that's the thing. Buy the free version and get in game currency and buyy 30$ worth and the gameplay is really good

. So just get the game

reviews.review_title: Pay to win games are garbage
reviews.review_description:
i hate this game because its free form is only knives but im not spending 30 dollars just to get guns in game 1 star game.



Ps i agree with the parents or kids who complain about the bullies and the harsh language its never fun to hear that

Let me start off by saying how much joy this game has brought me. It's truly phenomenal. One issue tho, it's the lack of moderation and the P2W starting off with moderation, very very bad. There is no clear report button so you either have to remember their user to report using meta, or find the(very hidden) report button. Next pay to win and lack of features for free to play, the packs are stupidly pricy,like $20 a pack. It's ludicrous! and the lack of a tutorial. I remember spending a day in the shooting range that was the entire game. Also, through my play through i experienced many ads for the full version. This is designed for little kids to blow their parents. Only because they don't know better. I love this game, but it's impossible to see through its flaws.

I think vail is honest to goodness the best vr shooter ever, but moderation is like a foreign concept to this game. I’ve heard 9 year olds calling people c words & n words, so I reported it, but I’ve seen them again. Also, the amount of times I’ve been spawned killed is crazy. I was thinking that maybe people could spawn with a pistol or smth. Apart from this stuff, it’s bug-free & beautiful graphics, so this game needs 2026 break game of the year.

reviews.review_title: Don’t get me wrong vail absolutely fun
reviews.review_description: To play friends am I right. Here we get to the part of vail were the bugs get so bad I don’t even want to play anymore

reviews.review_title: The BEST shooter in my opinion
reviews.review_description: I’d say this is the best shooter on virtual reality. Arguably the best game in vr. The community is nice but you do get some toxicity but you find that in every game. BUT in the extraction game mode there are glitches all the time. But better than the glitches in Tabor. TY for reading! Well done devs!!
